task: Caleb runner synthetic smoke test: navigate to example.com, screenshot, assert title, run a benign powershell echo

variables.purpose: Verifies caleb-runner.js step interpreter (navigate, screenshot, read_dom, assert, powershell) end-to-end without needing any captured browser auth state.

escalation_conditions: If any step fails the entire smoke is considered failed -- read the .result.json sidecar for the step_idx that broke.
notes: Drop this into C:\Users\Ashle\Solomon\caleb-queue\ to verify the runner. Auth_context=none means no storageState; opens a clean Chromium. Expected: result.json with status=completed, 7 steps all ok, screenshots in caleb-queue\screenshots\2026-06-02-synthetic-smoke\.
